title: Rasa Architecture Components
description: Layered architecture diagram of the Rasa framework, tracing a message through channels, the NLU pipeline, Core dialog management, and custom actions.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Explain how a message flows through the Rasa framework layers and the role of each component from NLU to custom actions.
